Men Beige Ethnic Mojaris.description:
A fancy pair of mojari for a grand reception event is a must-have since people will notice every little detail about you. For that, go for this classic mojari in a floral pattern design. This particular design has a perfect outward fabric PU lining texture and TPR outsole, which is both classic and sturdy at the same time. The chic look is perfectly balanced by the round toe and flat heel while the intricate detailing compliments to any ethnic ensemble.
Styling tips: This pair goes well with traditional wear like kurtas. Great for all ethnic or festive occasions.

Men Black-Gold Ethnic Jutis.description: These premium ethnic mojari sandals feature an elegant foil leather finish, offering a refined look perfect for special occasions. Their intricate detailing and comfortable design make them a standout piece.

Men Green Casual Loafers.description: Style meets impeccable quality in the Tristan Driver. Featuring a nubuck upper and a rubber sole, these drivers ensure you look good and stay comfortable, all day long.

Men Blue Casual Loafers.description: Step into comfort with these Solestreet Men's Casual Loafers, crafted with a luxurious suede finish and enhanced by a sleek metal detail on the vamp. These loafers offer both sophistication and comfort, ideal for day-to-day wear or casual outings.

Men Off-white Casual Loafers.description: A refined loafer that merges classic leather sophistication with modern comfort tech. Built with full-grain premium leather, Ortholite footbed, and a lightweight EVA sole, it's designed for effortless wear all day long.

Men Blue-suede Casual Loafers.description: Embrace relaxed elegance with these suede moccasin driving shoes from Davinchi by Solestreet. Designed for a casual lifestyle, they provide comfort and style in every step.

Men Beige Casual Loafers.description: Designed with a modern penny loafer look, these shoes weigh just 185 gms for effortless wear. Breathable knit uppers, premium leather trims, and a flexible EVA sole with TPR inserts ensure unmatched comfort and grip-perfect for driving or all-day use.

Men Light-green Casual Loafers.description: Engineered for effortless wear, these moccasins redefine lightness with a weight of just 165 gms. Breathable knit uppers, flexible EVA sole, and TPR traction inserts ensure all-day comfort and control, making them the ideal driving and everyday shoes.

Built with snug socklike fit, chunky block heel, and a stylish studded studded strap.,Comfortable Design: Allows the feet to move as naturally as possible, particularly around the toe area where maximum flexibility is required.,Premium Materials: Made with a comfortable faux leather upper and lining, these boots keep your heels and toes comfortable and protected from chafing and blisters.

Women Tan Formal Boots.description:
Solestreet's casual boots blend modern elegance with practical design, featuring a sleek synthetic upper with distinctive ribbed texturing.
These versatile boots are designed with a robust block heel, perfect for enhancing stability and style.

Women Beige Casual Gladiators.description: Add a statement to your casual wardrobe with these Solestreet Womens Gladiator Sandals. Designed with multiple faux leather straps and stylish beaded embellishments, these sandals offer a trendy look combined with everyday comfort. The open-toe design keeps your feet cool, while the cushioned footbed ensures you can wear them comfortably all day long.

Women Antic-gold Ethnic Mojaris.description: Crafted for a luxurious ethnic look, these embellished mojaris from Solestreet bring elegance and tradition together. The delicate detailing and beadwork create a rich aesthetic thats perfect for festive and traditional occasions. Featuring a faux suede footbed for comfort and a durable sheet sole, these mojaris offer both style and ease of wear. Designed with a slip-on style and a closed-toe silhouette, these flats complement ethnic wear beautifully.

Women Green Ethnic Jutis.description: Step into elegance with these embroidered mules from Solestreet, featuring intricate floral patterns and subtle sequins for a touch of shimmer. Perfect for casual or semi-formal occasions, these slip-on mules are designed to offer style and comfort in every step.

Featuring a faux suede footbed for comfort and a durable sheet sole, these mojaris offer both style and ease of wear.
